data_description.data_source: Choose where to read meter readings from: e-mail attachment, API, or both.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to check for new data (e.g. 3600 = 1 hour).

data_description.email_subject: Only messages whose subject contains this text will be processed.
data_description.email_action: "keep" = leave in inbox; "delete" = permanently delete; "move" = move to specified IMAP folder.
data_description.email_move_folder: IMAP folder name, e.g. Archive. The folder will be created if it does not exist.
data_description.tariff_price: Indicative electricity price (HUF/kWh) used for estimated daily cost calculation.

abort.already_configured: This E.ON Meter configuration has already been added.

data_description.email_action: keep = leave in inbox · delete = permanently delete · move = move to specified folder
data_description.email_move_folder: IMAP folder name, e.g. Archive — created automatically if it does not exist.
